note: One representative sample per realistic workflow scenario. For hard_decision_workflow, sample_actions are display-oriented and may replace hidden execution details with <agent-chosen ...> placeholders; reference_solution_commands preserves the canonical reference commands.

samples.sample_question: [Agent Delegation Followup] Delegate inbox-driven follow-up work to a dedicated helper agent. Create helper agent 'agent-planner-01', verify agents list, search inbox for 'budget', then add delegated follow-up task 'Agent Delegation Followup timeline check task for Berlin (budget)' due 2026-03-09.
sample_actions: tasks add --title 'Agent Delegation Followup timeline check task for Berlin (budget)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09
reference_solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Agent Delegation Followup timeline check task for Berlin (budget)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09

samples.sample_question: [Cron Digest Automation] Automate recurring digests and verify daily context. Create digest cron on '0 18 * * 1-5', verify cron list, pull 3-day forecast for San Francisco, then check today's calendar in America/Los_Angeles.
sample_actions: openclaw cron add --name cwf-cron-digest-automation-01 --cron '0 18 * * 1-5' --message 'Send cron digest automation execution block digest for San Francisco'
reference_solution_commands: openclaw cron add --name cwf-cron-digest-automation-01 --cron '0 18 * * 1-5' --message 'Send cron digest automation execution block digest for San Francisco'

email send --to ops@example.com --subject 'Multi Channel Status Broadcast action memo update for Paris' --body 'Multi Channel Status Broadcast action memo: completed triage on report and captured next actions for Paris.'
